tasks.label: Push Netflix site to GitHub
tasks.command: git status --short > .vscode/git-push.log 2>&1 && git add index.html browse.html details.html styles.css api.js script.js >> .vscode/git-push.log 2>&1 && git commit -m "Enhance streaming UI with detailed poster experience" >> .vscode/git-push.log 2>&1 && git push origin main >> .vscode/git-push.log 2>&1
